creator: stefan@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Martin,

there hasn't been an update on the problem report you sent [1] for quite a
while. The port x11-toolkits/plib does not have a maintainer, and nobody
has come up with a patch, yet; if you're still interested, you should
probably try to create one yourself and send it as a followup to this PR.

Regards,
Stefan

[1]: http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/137244
